title: Vibe-Appliance per-app manifest
description: Schema for .appliance/manifest.json shipped by each Vibe app. See docs/MANIFEST_SCHEMA.md.

subdomains.description: Phase 8.5 v1.2 — opt-in multi-subdomain manifest. When present, this list controls EMERGENCY-ACCESS wiring only (HAProxy emits one frontend per item with emergencyPort). The PRIMARY Caddy vhost still uses the top-level `subdomain` field — per-subdomain Caddy routing is a future enhancement gated on backend container splits in the upstream Vibe-* repos. Vibe-Connect's staff/client split is the canonical use case. Manifests should declare BOTH the legacy `subdomain` field (for Caddy) AND `subdomains[]` (for HAProxy multi-port emergency access); declaring `subdomains` alone is allowed but means no Caddy vhost. The `emergencyPort` values across items must be unique per manifest (HAProxy refuses to bind the same port twice).

audience.description: Free-form label shown in the Emergency Access panel. Conventional values: 'staff', 'client', 'default'.

emergencyPort.description: TCP port on the emergency HAProxy proxy (Phase 8.5 Workstream D). Plain HTTP, UFW-gated to RFC1918 + Tailscale CGNAT. Maps to this app's routing.default_upstream. See docs/addenda/emergency-access.md §3 for the canonical port assignments. Apps with userFacing=false MUST NOT declare an emergencyPort.

emergencyNote.description: Optional caveat displayed verbatim in CREDENTIALS.txt and the admin Emergency Access panel — e.g. for Vibe-Connect's client portal: 'Staff emergency access only. Client magic-link flows require HTTPS.'

userFacing.description: If false, the app is internal-only (consumed by other Vibe apps, never directly by users). Internal apps do not get an emergency port and may be excluded from the public landing page.

redis.description: Logical Redis DB index (0-15). Each app gets its own to prevent key collisions on the shared Redis instance.

requiredExtensions.description: Postgres extensions the app's migrations CREATE EXTENSION on first boot (e.g. ['vector','pg_search']). enable-app's pre-flight queries pg_available_extensions and refuses to start the app if any are missing — turning a confusing mid-migration failure into a clean preflight FAIL with a hint pointing at docker-compose.yml's postgres image.

health_timeout_s.description: How long to wait for the app's /health endpoint to respond 200 during enable / update before declaring failure. Default 120. Apps that load large models (e.g. Vibe-GLM-OCR's vision model) may need 300+.

seed.description: Optional. Run-once command (executed via docker exec on the server container) for apps whose admin-user seed is separate from migrations. enable-app.sh runs this after _wait_for_app_health succeeds and gates re-runs via state.apps.<slug>.seeded. See docs/MANIFEST_SCHEMA.md#seed.

from.description: Source for the value. See docs/MANIFEST_SCHEMA.md.

uiBlock.description: Admin Settings page surface for this env var. Phase 8.5 Workstream C. Absence means tier 3 (not surfaced). See docs/addenda/admin-config-surface.md §3.

tier.description: 1 = inline-editable form field; 2 = read-only with copy-paste rotation hint; 3 = not surfaced (default).

category.description: Settings page tab. Required for tier 1.

input.description: Form input widget. Required for tier 1.

dynamic.description: If set, the client merges live values from a server-provided source into the static options list at render time. Currently only 'anthropic-models' is supported (GET /api/v1/admin/anthropic-models).

appliance.description: Where the value lives. shared = appliance.env (cascades to all apps); per-app = vibe-<slug>.env (default); both = declared at both levels with per-app override.

restartRequired.description: If true (default), saving this setting restarts dependent apps with rollback-on-health-failure. If false, send SIGHUP only (forward-compat — no Vibe app supports SIGHUP reload yet).

validate.description: Server-side validator name. Constrained to the dispatcher's known set so a typo (e.g. 'anthropic-key') fails schema validation rather than blowing up at save time.

testEndpoint.description: Console route the Test button POSTs current form values to (without persisting). See addendum §5.

dependsOnFields.description: Field names this field depends on, used for client-side conditional rendering.

showIf.description: Predicate keyed by FIELD_NAME → required value. Field hidden until predicate satisfied.

postSaveJob.description: Background job triggered after save. e.g. 'corpus-sync' for Tax-Research-Chat ENABLED_STATES.

healthCheckTimeout.description: Override the default 90s post-restart health-check window. Apps with slow warm-up (e.g. LLM-backed) may need 180+.

disabledImpacts.description: Strings naming features that break if this setting is set to a disabling value (e.g. EMAIL_PROVIDER=none disables 'client-portal-in-vibe-connect'). The Settings page surfaces these as a confirmation dialog before save.
